pokemon:primeape.name: Primeape
pokemon:primeape.summary: When Primeape becomes furious, its blood circulation is boosted. In turn, its muscles are made even stronger. However, it also becomes much less intelligent at the same time.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: When Primeape becomes furious, its blood circulation is boosted. In turn, its muscles are made even stronger. However, it also becomes much less intelligent at the same time.
It grows angry if you see its eyes and gets angrier if you run. If you beat it, it gets even madder.
It grows angry if you see its eyes and gets angrier if you run. If you beat it, it gets even madder.
Always furious and tenacious to boot. It will not abandon chasing its quarry until it is caught.
It will beat up anyone who makes it mad, even if it has to chase them until the end of the world.
It grows angry if you see its eyes and gets angrier if you run. If you beat it, it gets even madder.
When it becomes furious, its blood circulation becomes more robust, and its muscles are made stronger. But it also becomes much less intelligent.
It is always outrageously furious. If it gives chase, it will tenaciously track the target no matter how far.
If approached while asleep, it may awaken and angrily give chase in a groggy state of semi-sleep.
If approached while asleep, it may awaken and angrily give chase in a groggy state of semi-sleep.
Always furious and tenacious to boot. It will not abandon chasing its quarry until it catches up.
It stops being angry only when nobody else is around. To view this moment is very difficult.
It stops being angry only when nobody else is around. To view this moment is very difficult.
Some researchers theorize that Primeape remains angry even when inside a Poké Ball.
When Primeape becomes furious, its blood circulation is boosted. In turn, its muscles are made even stronger. However, it also becomes much less intelligent at the same time.
It grows angry if you see its eyes and gets angrier if you run. If you beat it, it gets even madder.
It grows angry if you see its eyes and gets angrier if you run. If you beat it, it gets even madder.
Always furious and tenacious to boot. It will not abandon chasing its quarry until it is caught.
When PRIMEAPE becomes furious, its blood circulation is boosted. In turn, its muscles are made even stronger. However, it also becomes much less intelligent at the same time.
When PRIMEAPE becomes furious, its blood circulation is boosted. In turn, its muscles are made even stronger. However, it also becomes much less intelligent at the same time.
It becomes wildly furious if it even senses someone looking at it. It chases anyone that meets its glare.
It becomes wildly furious if it even senses someone looking at it. It chases anyone that meets its glare.
It has been known to become so angry that it dies as a result. Its face looks peaceful in death, however.
The blood vessels in its brain are sturdier than those of other Pokémon, so it can stay healthy despite its constant raging.
It will never forgive opponents who have angered it. Even after it has beaten them down until they can’t move, it never ever forgives.
It grows angry if you see its eyes and gets angrier if you run. If you beat it, it gets even madder.
It grows angry if you see its eyes and gets angrier if you run. If you beat it, it gets even madder.
It stops being angry only when nobody else is around. To view this moment is very difficult.
It is always outrageously furious. If it gives chase, it will tenaciously track the target no matter how far.
It stops being angry only when nobody else is around. To view this moment is very difficult.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: When Primeape becomes furious, its blood circulation is boosted. In turn, its muscles are made even stronger. However, it also becomes much less intelligent at the same time.

pokemon:annihilape.name: Annihilape
pokemon:annihilape.summary: When its anger rose beyond a critical point, this Pokémon gained power that is unfettered by the limits of its physical body.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: When its anger rose beyond a critical point, this Pokémon gained power that is unfettered by the limits of its physical body.
It imbues its fists with the power of the rage that it kept hidden in its heart. Opponents struck by these imbued fists will be shattered to their core.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: When its anger rose beyond a critical point, this Pokémon gained power that is unfettered by the limits of its physical body.

pokemon:mankey.name: Mankey
pokemon:mankey.summary: When Mankey starts shaking and its nasal breathing turns rough, it’s a sure sign that it is becoming angry. However, because it goes into a towering rage almost instantly, it is impossible for anyone to flee its wrath.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: When Mankey starts shaking and its nasal breathing turns rough, it’s a sure sign that it is becoming angry. However, because it goes into a towering rage almost instantly, it is impossible for anyone to flee its wrath.
It lives in treetop colonies. If one becomes enraged, the whole colony rampages for no reason.
It lives in treetop colonies. If one becomes enraged, the whole colony rampages for no reason.
Extremely quick to anger. It could be docile one moment then thrashing away the next instant.
It lives in groups in the treetops. If it loses sight of its group, it becomes infuriated by its loneliness.
It lives in treetop colonies. If one becomes enraged, the whole colony rampages for no reason.
When it starts shaking and its nasal breathing turns rough, it’s a sure sign of anger. However, since this happens instantly, there is no time to flee.
Light and agile on its feet, and ferocious in temperament. When angered, it flies into an uncontrollable frenzy.
It is extremely ill-tempered. Groups of them will attack any handy target for no reason.
It is extremely ill-tempered. Groups of them will attack any handy target for no reason.
Extremely quick to anger. It could be docile one moment, then thrashing away the next instant.
An agile Pokémon that lives in trees. It angers easily and will not hesitate to attack anything.
An agile Pokémon that lives in trees. It angers easily and will not hesitate to attack anything.
Its raging tires it out and causes it to fall asleep, but the anger resonating in its dreams causes it to wake up—which infuriates it all over again.

When Mankey starts shaking and its nasal breathing turns rough, it’s a sure sign that it is becoming angry. However, because it goes into a towering rage almost instantly, it is impossible for anyone to flee its wrath.
It lives in treetop colonies. If one becomes enraged, the whole colony rampages for no reason.
It lives in treetop colonies. If one becomes enraged, the whole colony rampages for no reason.
Extremely quick to anger. It could be docile one moment then thrashing away the next instant.

When MANKEY starts shaking and its nasal breathing turns rough, it’s a sure sign that it is becoming angry. However, because it goes into a towering rage almost instantly, it is impossible for anyone to flee its wrath.

When MANKEY starts shaking and its nasal breathing turns rough, it’s a sure sign that it is becoming angry. However, because it goes into a towering rage almost instantly, it is impossible for anyone to flee its wrath.
It's unsafe to ap­ proach if it gets violently enraged for no reason and can't distinguish friends from foes.
It’s unsafe to approach if it gets violently enraged for no reason and can’t distinguish friends from foes.
It can spontaneously become enraged. Everyone near it clears out as it rampages, and the resulting loneliness makes it angrier still.
If one gets angry, all the others around it will get angry, so silence is a rare visitor in a troop of Mankey.
The smallest of things could cause it to lose its temper. Because it doesn’t hold in its stress, this Pokémon can live a long time.
It lives in treetop colonies. If one becomes enraged, the whole colony rampages for no reason.
It lives in treetop colonies. If one becomes enraged, the whole colony rampages for no reason.
It’s unsafe to approach if it gets violently enraged for no reason and can’t distinguish friends from foes.
It lives in treetop colonies. If one becomes enraged, the whole colony rampages for no reason.
An agile POKéMON that lives in trees. It angers easily and will not hesitate to attack anything.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: When Mankey starts shaking and its nasal breathing turns rough, it’s a sure sign that it is becoming angry. However, because it goes into a towering rage almost instantly, it is impossible for anyone to flee its wrath.
